info.name: Immobilier_node
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Immobilier.ch real estate platform.

## Overview
This API simulates the Swiss real-estate platform immobilier.ch with support for:
- Agencies and private owners posting properties
- Admin moderation and approval
- Multi-language content (EN, FR, DE, IT)
- Search, favorites, alerts, leads
- Strong RBAC and auditability

## Authentication
Most endpoints require JWT authentication. Use the Auth endpoints to obtain tokens.

## Test Credentials
- **Super Admin**: superadmin.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- **Platform Admin**: platformadmin1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- **Agency Admin**: agencyadmin1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- **Agent**: agent1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- **Owner**: owner1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- **End User**: user1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!

## Language Support
Use `Accept-Language` header with values: `en`, `fr`, `de`, `it`

## API Version
Current version: v1
Base URL: http://localhost:4003/api/v1

item.description:
Property image management endpoints.

## Upload Methods
- **File Upload**: Upload images via multipart/form-data
- **URL Import**: Import images from external URLs to Cloudinary
- **External Reference**: Store references to externally hosted images

## Features
- Automatic image optimization (resize, compress, WebP conversion)
- Automatic thumbnail generation (400x300)
- Batch upload support (up to 20 images)
- Image metadata management (alt text, caption, sort order)
- Primary image designation
- Cloudinary cleanup on delete
Property moderation and image management.
